title: cloiselia carbonaria
intro: Cloiselia carbonaria, also known as carbonaria or carbonated cloiselia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Cloiselia carbonaria is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a carminative and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to relieve digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cloiselia carbonaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
